auth.welcome_subtitle: Sign in as customer or tailor to validate end-to-end flows. Admin accounts are redirected to Filament.
auth.customer_brand_subtitle: Browse products, place tailoring orders, and follow progress in real time from one reliable workspace.
auth.tailor_brand_subtitle: Accept incoming orders, manage availability, and update delivery progress with operational clarity.
auth.customer_register_subtitle: Set up customer access to browse catalog items and place tailoring requests quickly.
auth.tailor_register_subtitle: Register as a tailor to access your work queue, availability controls, and status updates.
auth.customer_point_two: Track active and historical orders from one place
auth.tailor_point_one: Access active work and history with clean status flows
auth.tailor_point_three: Keep customers informed through realtime updates
auth.trust_note: Authorized access only. Sessions are secured and monitored.
auth.sign_in_subtitle: Use your account credentials to continue.
auth.create_account_subtitle: Choose your role and complete the fields below.
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.customer_register_hint: Customer accounts are ready immediately after registration.
auth.tailor_register_hint: Tailor accounts may require approval based on platform policy.
auth.tailor_registration_details_hint: Complete your professional profile to speed up approval and regional matching.
auth.phone_number_helper: Use a reachable number. A verification code will be sent after signup.
auth.commercial_register_helper: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP, PDF (max 5 MB).
auth.phone_verification_required_notice: Your account is created. Verify your phone number to unlock tailor workspace access.
auth.verify_phone_brand_subtitle: Confirm your phone number to finalize tailor onboarding and access operational routes.
auth.verify_phone_point_one: Protect account access with verified contact data
auth.verify_phone_point_three: Prepare regional assignment and support routing
auth.verify_phone_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.
auth.verify_phone_resend_hint_default: Did not receive a code? Request a new one.
auth.verify_phone_resend_hint_wait: If needed, request a new code after {seconds}s.
auth.verify_phone_failed: Unable to verify the phone code.
auth.phone_code_resent: A new verification code has been sent.
auth.forbidden_description: You are signed in, but this route is not available for your role.

layout.realtime_warning: Realtime warning: {message}. Order lists may require manual refresh.

public.footer_tagline: Tailoring on demand for customers and local professionals.
public.home_title: Book trusted tailoring and track each order in real time.
public.home_subtitle: Makasouk connects customers with nearby tailors through a practical order flow, clear status updates, and realtime progress across every step.
public.home_journey_description: From measurement submission to completion in a predictable lifecycle.
public.home_journey_step_1: Select a category and product, then submit your order measurements.
public.home_journey_step_2: Nearby approved tailors receive the order and can accept it quickly.
public.home_journey_step_3: Track status updates in realtime until ready for delivery and completion.
public.home_trust_title: Why customers and tailors trust Makasouk
public.home_trust_description: Built for reliability, transparency, and fast local coordination.
public.home_trust_card_1_description: Every order follows explicit status transitions with clear actor permissions.
public.home_trust_card_2_description: Customers and tailors receive near-instant updates from private channels.
public.home_trust_card_3_description: Role-based access and audited admin workflows protect day-to-day operations.
public.home_value_description: Clear outcomes for both customers and tailors.
public.home_customers_point_1: Browse categories and products with transparent pricing.
public.home_customers_point_2: Create orders with measurement payloads and location data.
public.home_customers_point_3: Track active and historical orders from one dashboard.
public.home_tailors_point_1: Receive nearby order offers and accept only when available.
public.home_tailors_point_2: Move orders through allowed statuses safely.
public.home_tailors_point_3: Manage availability and profile visibility in-app.
public.home_bottom_description: Sign in to the web client and validate customer or tailor workflows now.
public.how_it_works_description: A clear order lifecycle for customers, tailors, and operations teams.
public.how_it_works_step_1_description: Customers choose a product, submit measurements, and provide delivery coordinates.
public.how_it_works_step_2_description: Nearby approved tailors receive realtime notifications and can accept available work.
public.how_it_works_step_3_description: Order progress moves through controlled statuses until ready and completed.
public.how_it_works_realtime_description: Status changes are emitted through private channels and consumed by the web client in near real time.
public.for_customers_description: A straightforward ordering experience with transparent progress updates.
public.for_customers_capabilities_1: Browse active catalog categories and products.
public.for_customers_capabilities_2: Create orders with measurement JSON and delivery location.
public.for_customers_capabilities_3: Track active orders and review full history.
public.for_customers_capabilities_4: Cancel in allowed lifecycle windows and submit post-completion reviews.
public.for_customers_why_1: Predictable states reduce uncertainty during fulfillment.
public.for_customers_why_2: Realtime updates remove the need for manual refresh loops.
public.for_customers_why_3: Order details capture product, tailor assignment, and lifecycle hints.
public.for_tailors_description: Receive nearby jobs, manage availability, and move orders through valid statuses.
public.for_tailors_flow_1: Set your availability and location through the tailor shell.
public.for_tailors_flow_2: Receive realtime nearby order offers on private channels.
public.for_tailors_flow_3: Accept orders and update statuses according to lifecycle rules.
public.for_tailors_flow_4: Cancel only within allowed windows when continuation is not possible.
public.for_tailors_reliability_1: Clear status contracts reduce accidental transitions.
public.for_tailors_reliability_2: Profile and rating summary are available in one place.
public.for_tailors_reliability_3: Active order focus helps prioritize in-progress work.
public.for_tailors_approval_description: Tailor access to work opportunities depends on account approval and active account state.
public.faq_description: Practical answers for client-app usage and order tracking.
public.faq_q1: How do I start as a customer?
public.faq_a1: Open the web app, sign in, browse catalog items, then create your first order.
public.faq_a2: Orders are broadcast to nearby approved tailors, and the first valid acceptance assigns the order.
public.faq_q3: Can I track status without refreshing?
public.faq_a3: Yes. Customer and tailor pages consume realtime events over authenticated private channels.
public.faq_a4: All admin workflows run separately in Filament under /admin-panel.
public.contact_description: This placeholder support page is ready for future ticketing/chat integrations.
public.contact_intro: For local testing, please use project maintainers and seeded accounts. For production handoff, connect this page to your final support workflow.
public.contact_next_step_description: Phase 7 can wire this placeholder to real contact APIs or external helpdesk providers.
public.home_best_sellers_description: Customer favorites selected from real order activity and curated marketplace performance.
public.home_no_best_sellers_description: Published products and completed orders will populate this section automatically.
public.home_stats_description: Live operational signals from the marketplace.
public.home_testimonials_description: Real feedback from completed tailoring experiences.
public.home_testimonial_fallback_comment: A refined marketplace experience for custom tailoring, from product discovery to order tracking.

seo.default_description: Makasouk connects customers and tailors through realtime order workflows and reliable lifecycle tracking.
seo.home_description: Book trusted tailoring and track each order in real time with Makasouk.
seo.how_it_works_description: Understand Makasouk's customer-tailor order lifecycle from order creation to completion.
seo.for_customers_description: Browse catalog items, create orders, and track active tailoring jobs with confidence.
seo.for_tailors_description: Accept nearby orders, update statuses, and manage your availability as a Makasouk tailor.
seo.faq_description: Common questions about Makasouk order tracking, realtime updates, and platform usage.
seo.contact_description: Get support details for Makasouk web platform usage and operations.

products.catalog_description: Browse active categories and products, then create an order directly.
products.no_description_available: No description available for this product yet.
products.no_details_available: Detailed product notes are not available for this product yet.
products.similar_products_description: Explore more options from the same category and tailoring direction.
products.no_similar_products: No similar products are available yet.

filters.search_placeholder: Search by product name or description

orders.create_description: Configure your product, submit measurements, then confirm your delivery details.
orders.setup_step_description: Choose the product options, fabric, and measurements first.
orders.shipping_step_description: Add delivery contact details, pickup office, and map location.
orders.product_required_error: Please choose a product before continuing.
orders.configuration_summary_description: Review the product and selected options before confirming shipping.
orders.color_selection_hint: Choose the color your tailor should follow.
orders.color_selection_required: Please choose a color before continuing.
orders.fabric_selection_hint: Confirm the fabric reference you want for this order.
orders.fabric_selection_required: Please choose a fabric before continuing.
orders.measurement_no_guide: No detailed guide text provided for this measurement.
orders.measurements_legacy_description: This product has no configured measurement definitions yet. Use legacy key/value JSON for compatibility.
orders.measurements_incomplete: Please complete every required measurement before continuing.
orders.shipping_section_description: This order uses office pickup only. Add the branch, contact data, and exact location.
orders.location_captured_success: Current location captured for this order. You can still adjust the marker on the map.
orders.location_capture_failed: Unable to fetch current location automatically. Select your point on the map or use the wilaya fallback.
orders.active_description: Realtime-enabled list of your currently active customer orders.
orders.shipping_limited_notice: Detailed shipping information is hidden until you accept the order.
orders.pattern_locked_notice: Pattern files unlock after accepting this order.
orders.pattern_not_available: No pattern file is attached to this product yet.

timeline_descriptions.admin_review: The order is under operational review.
timeline_descriptions.tailor_assignment_pending: The platform is still matching this order to a suitable tailor.
timeline_descriptions.assigned_to_tailor: A tailor accepted the order and is responsible for the next steps.
timeline_descriptions.work_started: Production work has started for this order.
timeline_descriptions.product_completed: The product was completed and is moving to fulfillment.
timeline_descriptions.preparing: The order is being prepared for shipping or pickup.
timeline_descriptions.sent_to_shipping_center: The order was sent to the shipping center.
timeline_descriptions.arrived: The order arrived and is awaiting final handoff.
timeline_descriptions.received: The customer confirmed receipt of the order.

customers.dashboard_description: Quick operational snapshot for your account and order activity.
customers.workspace_subtitle: Orders, tracking, profile, and reviews in one secure space.
customers.layout_hint: Track purchases, manage quotes, and keep your profile updated.
customers.dashboard_quotes_description: Follow pricing responses and decide whether to continue or reject.
customers.dashboard_purchases_description: Your latest purchased products and order totals.
customers.dashboard_reviews_description: Your latest published ratings and comments.
customers.dashboard_tracking_description: Watch every production and delivery milestone in one place.
customers.empty_active_tracking: You do not have active tracked orders right now.
customers.empty_custom_orders: No custom product requests are active right now.
customers.empty_purchased_products: No purchased products are available yet.
customers.empty_reviews: No reviews have been submitted yet.
customers.custom_order_note_empty: No extra notes were added for this request.
customers.purchased_products_description: All purchased products with pricing, delivery status, and review eligibility.
customers.profile_description: Update your customer identity, phone number, and profile picture.
customers.avatar_hint: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP up to 5 MB.
customers.security_description: Use your current password to set a new secure password.
customers.reviews_description: Ratings and comments submitted after completed deliveries.
customers.review_comment_empty: No comment was added to this review.
customers.history_standard_orders_description: Completed and cancelled storefront orders remain available here.
customers.history_custom_orders_description: Rejected, delivered, and closed custom tailoring requests remain visible here.
customers.review_restriction_hint: Reviews are available only after the order is delivered or received.

tailors.dashboard_description: Realtime offer feed and profile summary for current operations.
tailors.empty_active_orders: No active orders assigned to you.
tailors.availability_description: Control whether you can receive nearby order offers.
tailors.accept_order_description: This order came from realtime nearby notifications.
tailors.profile_description: Profile summary and saved location used for nearby order matching.
tailors.detect_location_failed: Unable to detect your current location automatically. Select your point on the map or use the manual fallback.
tailors.update_tracking_description: Move the order through the production and delivery timeline with an optional note.

maps.click_to_select: Click the map to select your location. Coordinates are saved in the background.
maps.load_failed: Unable to load the map. You can still use the manual fallback fields.
maps.outside_algeria: Please select a location inside Algeria.
maps.reverse_geocode_failed: Location selected, but wilaya lookup was not available.

custom_orders.page_description: Send reference images, measurements, and instructions for a tailored quote.
custom_orders.create_description: Upload your reference images, fill only the needed measurements, and send the request for pricing.
custom_orders.fabric_type_hint: Describe the preferred fabric if you already know it.
custom_orders.reference_images_hint: Upload one or more design or inspiration images (up to 6 files).
custom_orders.notes_hint: Share fit notes, finishing details, or anything the admin and tailor should know.
custom_orders.measurements_description: Fill only the measurements needed for this request. Leave the rest empty.
custom_orders.delivery_description: Set the delivery wilaya and map location to support assignment and shipping.
custom_orders.manage_description: Review active quotes, accepted requests, and past rejections from one place.
custom_orders.empty_active: No active custom product requests were found.
custom_orders.empty_history: No historical custom product requests were found.
custom_orders.reject_modal_description: Add a note so the admin team understands why you do not want to continue.
custom_orders.process_step_1: Submit references, fabric preference, notes, location, and any needed measurements.
custom_orders.process_step_2: Admin reviews the request and sends a proposed quote with an optional pricing note.
custom_orders.process_step_3: You can accept the quote for assignment or reject it with a visible rejection note.
custom_orders.process_step_4: Accepted requests move into tailor assignment and progress tracking automatically.
custom_orders.discovery_description: If the product is not in the catalog, use the custom order workspace to request a quote.

timeline_descriptions.placed: The custom request was submitted and is waiting for admin review.
timeline_descriptions.admin_review: Admin is reviewing the submitted references, measurements, and instructions.
timeline_descriptions.quoted: A proposed price and pricing note were sent back to you.
timeline_descriptions.quote_accepted: The customer accepted the quote and the request can move to assignment.
timeline_descriptions.quote_rejected: The customer rejected the quote and left a visible note.
timeline_descriptions.tailor_assignment_pending: The request is waiting for the best available tailor to be assigned.
timeline_descriptions.assigned_to_tailor: A suitable tailor was assigned to continue the work.
timeline_descriptions.work_started: The tailor started working on the requested piece.
timeline_descriptions.cutting_started: Cutting has started for the custom piece.
timeline_descriptions.sewing_started: Sewing is in progress for the custom piece.
timeline_descriptions.product_completed: The custom piece is completed and ready for the next step.
timeline_descriptions.completed: The custom order production work is completed.
timeline_descriptions.preparing: The completed piece is being prepared for shipping or pickup.
timeline_descriptions.sent_to_shipping_center: The order was sent to the shipping center.
timeline_descriptions.arrived: The shipment arrived and is waiting for customer handoff.
timeline_descriptions.received: The customer received the custom order.
timeline_descriptions.delivered: The custom order was delivered successfully.
